symphony.example: The orchestra played a famous symphony.
symphony.example_zh: 管弦樂團演奏了一首著名的交響曲。

synthetic.example: The jacket is made of synthetic material.
synthetic.example_zh: 這件外套是用合成材料製成的。

syrup.example: She poured syrup over the pancakes.

tan.example: He got a deep tan at the beach.
Her skin tanned quickly in the sun.
tan.example_zh: 她的皮膚在陽光下很快就曬黑了。

tedious.example: Copying the list was a tedious task.
tedious.example_zh: 抄寫這份清單是件枯燥的工作。

telecommunications.example: She works in the telecommunications industry.

teller.example: The bank teller counted the money.

tempo.example: The song has a fast tempo.

tenant.example: The tenant pays rent every month.

tentative.example: We made a tentative plan for Sunday.
tentative.example_zh: 我們為星期天訂了一個暫定的計畫。

terrace.example: We had dinner on the terrace.

textile.example: The town is famous for its textile industry.
textile.example_zh: 這個小鎮以紡織業聞名。

thereafter.example: He left school and worked thereafter.
thereafter.example_zh: 他離開學校，之後就去工作了。

tilt.example: She tilted her head to listen.
The table has a slight tilt.

tiptoe.example: She walked on tiptoe so as not to wake the baby.
tiptoe.example_zh: 她踮著腳走，以免吵醒寶寶。

token.example: He gave her a flower as a token of thanks.
token.example_zh: 他送她一朵花以表謝意。

tornado.example: A tornado tore through the small town.
tornado.example_zh: 一場龍捲風橫掃了這個小鎮。

trademark.example: The logo is a registered trademark.

transcript.example: She sent her transcript to the college.
transcript.example_zh: 她把成績單寄給了大學。

transmit.example: The station transmits the signal far away.
transmit.example_zh: 電台把訊號傳送到很遠的地方。

transplant.example: He had a heart transplant last year.
transplant.example_zh: 他去年做了心臟移植手術。
他們把小樹移植到別處。

treasury.example: The gold was kept in the royal treasury.
treasury.example_zh: 黃金被保存在皇家金庫裡。

trek.example: They made a long trek through the jungle.
trek.example_zh: 他們在叢林中長途跋涉。

trek.example: We trekked up the mountain for hours.
trek.example_zh: 我們花了好幾個小時徒步上山。

trifle.example: Don't waste time on such a trifle.
trifle.example_zh: 別把時間浪費在這種小事上。

trillion.example: The galaxy has trillions of stars.
trillion.example_zh: 銀河系裡有數兆顆星星。

tropic.example: Bananas grow well in the tropics.
tropic.example_zh: 香蕉在熱帶地區長得很好。

trout.example: He caught a trout in the cold stream.
trout.example_zh: 他在冰冷的溪流裡釣到一條鱒魚。

trustee.example: The trustee manages the school's money.
trustee.example_zh: 受託人管理學校的資金。

tuck.example: She tucked the blanket around the child.
tuck.example_zh: 她把毯子替孩子蓋好掖緊。

turmoil.example: The country was in political turmoil.
turmoil.example_zh: 這個國家陷入政治動盪。

twilight.example: The birds returned home at twilight.

twinkle.example: The stars twinkle in the night sky.
There was a twinkle in his eye.

unanimous.zh: 一致同意的、全體一致的
unanimous.example_zh: 這次投票結果一致通過。

underneath.example: The cat hid underneath the bed.
She wore a shirt with a vest underneath.
underneath.example_zh: 她穿了件襯衫，裡面還穿了背心。

underpass.example: We walked through the underpass to cross.
underpass.example_zh: 我們走地下道穿越馬路。

underway.example_zh: 這個專案已經在進行中了。

unification.example: The unification of the two groups took time.
unification.example_zh: 這兩個團體的統合花了一些時間。

unify.example: A common goal can unify a team.
unify.example_zh: 共同的目標能凝聚一支團隊。

unveil.example: The company unveiled its new phone.
unveil.example_zh: 這家公司發表了新手機。

upright.example: Please sit upright in your chair.

urgency.example: Her voice was full of urgency.

usher.example: An usher showed us to our seats.
usher.example_zh: 一位引座員帶我們入座。

utensil.example: A spoon is a common kitchen utensil.
utensil.example_zh: 湯匙是常見的廚房用具。

utter.example: She did not utter a single word.
The room was in utter darkness.

vaccine.example: The vaccine protects against the virus.
vaccine.example_zh: 這種疫苗能預防這種病毒。

vanilla.example: I'd like a scoop of vanilla ice cream.
vanilla.example_zh: 我想要一球香草冰淇淋。

vanity.example: His vanity made him buy expensive clothes.
vanity.example_zh: 他的虛榮心讓他買昂貴的衣服。

vapor.example: Water turns to vapor when it boils.

veil.example: The bride wore a white veil.

velvet.example: The box was lined with soft velvet.
velvet.example_zh: 這個盒子裡襯著柔軟的絲絨。
